contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Multi-program members fix — Gary appears in both Tribo Mirim + Butterfly Effect cohorts
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/12
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/118
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/7
  
  Details:
  Closes spec §12 open question 3 (multi-program members) which surfaced as a regression today when seeding Gary into Butterfly Effect: his primary_program got re-derived alphabetically to 'butterfly-effect' (b < c), dropping him from the Tribo Mirim cohort listing.
  
  Two-PR fix landed end-to-end:
  
  1. lineage-engine#12 (squash 63b93e9) — emit programs[] + score-based primary_program
     - Every _cache/index.json entry now carries a  array listing all keys of cv.programs (not just the first one).
     - primary_program resolves by activity score (practice_count desc, total_practice_minutes desc) instead of dict insertion order, so the historically-meaningful primary doesn't flip when a new earlier-alphabetical program is added.
  
  2. truesight_me beta#118 (squash 18283e2) + prod#7 (squash 979cae1) — cohort filter on programs[]
     - renderMembers in program-shell.js filters on m.programs.indexOf(filterProgram) instead of m.primary_program === filterProgram.
     - Fallback to the old equality check when the new array isn't on the entry yet (rolling-rebuild window).
  
  Live verification post-deploy:
    - https://truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/members.html → ['Gary Teh', 'pk-4LBWHX9DJ_wH', 'pk-o-VOrzMyYhXs'] — Gary is back
    - https://truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/members.html → ['Gary Teh', 'Bilal'] — Gary stayed
    - index.json gary-teh entry: primary_program='capoeira-tribo-mirim', programs=['butterfly-effect', 'capoeira-tribo-mirim']
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
